title: MITRE ATT&CK Navigator + Executive Dashboard — Board Report Automation
description: executive_dashboard.py has FAIR Monte Carlo ALE simulation, risk trend snapshots, peer benchmarking, regulatory risk heatmap, M&A due diligence, and board report generation. test_mitre_navigator.py validates 14 tactics and 100+ techniques. Gap: the board report is a JSON dict that must be manually formatted; no PDF/HTML rendering pipeline exists, and the MITRE coverage data is static rather than computed from actual hunt/detection results.
missing: Board report PDF rendering: Jinja2 HTML template + weasyprint PDF generation for the board report JSON, accessible via /api/v1/exec-reporting/board-report/export
Live MITRE coverage from detections: query threat_hunting_engine and siem_integration_engine results to compute actual ATT&CK technique coverage percentage
Regulatory risk heatmap live scoring: pull compliance_mapping_engine implementation_rates to update the GDPR/HIPAA/PCI-DSS heatmap in real time
